action.reasoning: Observation: The 6.2% validation-LSTM blend was marginally below the current 6.0% best, while 5.8%, 5.5%, 5%, 7%, and 10% were also lower. Analysis: The optimum is tightly centered around 6%, and a 6.1% checkpoint-only probe is cheap with enough remaining time. Decision: create a 6.1% validation-LSTM / 93.9% combined-GRU blend using the existing weighted mix script, smoke-test predict.py, and submit it.
action.command: python make_weighted_mix2.py --alpha-lstm 0.061 --out checkpoints/mix_gru939_lstmval61.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/mix_gru939_lstmval61.pt --output smoke_predictions_mix61.json

command_output.stderr:
usage: make_weighted_mix2.py [-h] [--gru GRU] [--lstm LSTM]
                             [--alpha_lstm ALPHA_LSTM] --out OUT
make_weighted_mix2.py: error: unrecognized arguments: --alpha-lstm 0.061
